deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA: 31 comps, avg $207K, est value $266K. Close May 1 2026.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link, used as basis for building property analysis tool

Isaac development interest discussed - mobile home concept with veteran housing component

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3 bed 2 bath, 2972 sqft. VA loan payoff ~$493K. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Sellers moving back in to make updates. Listed at $528,999, 208 DOM.
deals.next: Terminated by mutual agreement May 29 - awaiting signed release

Call completed - Chandler laid off, short sale likely path forward, relationship intact

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3 bed 2.5 bath, 1886 sqft. List $259,900. Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC, June deadline. Potential hairline foundation crack. Insurance roof claim in progress.
deals.next: Monitor second-look buyers - they are hottest lead. Confirm May 30 showing time.

logs.m: Second-look buyers favorite property, came back for second showing, pre-inspection report offered
MLS live, sign and lockbox dropped, neighborhood canvassed, first showing 9:15am

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3 bed 2 bath, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Recommended list price $295K. Divorce situation, need to sell. Prior clients via Cynthia Dominguez.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing. Confirm acreage. Get listing agreement signed.
